/CAL:STATUS OF M99 21009642/LD:09-13-21 (GC)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITYPROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT REMAINS CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENT (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TRAIL 21009642/DOP/

/CAL:TRIAL/FTRRECORDED/X:CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/LD:09-13-21/NP/DEF:ON ACM/CAUSE1/X:WRITTEN GOOD CAUSE ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE DEKREON AND FILED/X:ORAL OBJECTION AND ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS BY DEFENSE HEARD/CONTD:TRIAL/DOPU:ACM REPORT/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:ALEX PINNEL, SFPD/X:DEFENSE 17B MOTIONIS GRANTED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:09-27-21/CONTD:SET OR DISPO/DAWF/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/EMMOD: FULL HOME DETENTION IS VACATED AND A CURFEW IS NOW IMPOSED BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 6PM-6AM THE DEFENDANT IS TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES/CTORD:TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE IMMEDIATELY FOR THE MODIFICATION OF THE TERMS OF THE EM RELEASE/CONT/DOP/X: MATTERRECALLED IN THE AFTERNOON,  LARRY DESOUZA APPEARING ON BEHALF OFPIZZA/X:SUBPEONAED CAD IS RELEASED TO PD KATHLEEN NATIVIDAD/
